text:
ンンン……良かったよ！
すごく良かった！
僕は満足だよ！

シンクロウが颯爽と走り
君がベストタイミングでフォローする！
サモナーの理想的な姿だったよ！

子供達と君との戦いぶりを
もっともっと見させて欲しい！
よろしく

Mmm, wonderful!
That was just wonderful!
Even better than I'd imagined!

Synchro fearlessly charges into battle
as you offer your carefully-timed support!
Truly an ideal Summoner-baby relationship!

I hope to witness you and your darlings
in action again! Many thanks!
